qa_pair.question: How many folders does the account have listed (root-level or nested)?
Which sender address in the INBOX has sent the most messages? Give just the email address.
What is the subject line of the most recent unread message in the INBOX from the notifications@github.com address? Include the issue number.
How many messages are in the INBOX.Archivo folder?
Search the INBOX for messages whose SUBJECT contains "Reunión". How many results are returned?
The message from juan@dominio.com with subject "Contrato firmado (PDF adjunto)" has one attachment. What is its filename?
What is the MIME type of the attachment in the "Contrato firmado" email? Answer in the format type/subtype.
How many messages are in the thread that starts with the "Reunión semanal — jueves 10am" email?
Search the INBOX for messages whose FROM contains "billing@stripe.com". How many results are returned?
Look at the "Presupuesto Q3 revisado" message from maria@dominio.com. Besides the primary recipient, who else received this message (single email address in the To field)?
